professionalSummary: Highly skilled Senior Flutter Software Engineer specializing in engineering enterprise cross-platform applications (Mobile, Desktop, and Web), offline-first business solutions, and POS/ERP systems. Proven track record of reverse-engineering legacy systems, designing high-performance relational local databases (SQLite/Hive), and integrating hardware-level features like USB/Bluetooth/IP thermal printing with RTL Arabic shaping. Expert in Clean Architecture, modular system design, and real-time synchronization pipelines.

achievements: Architected and deployed enterprise-grade cross-platform apps for Mobile, Windows Desktop, and Web platforms.
Refactored high-debt monolithic mobile codebases into modular Clean Architecture features, reducing code coupling by 40%.
Developed full offline-first engines with robust background data syncing and conflict resolution using Hive and SQLite.
Built hardware printing modules communicating directly via ESC/POS protocol over USB serial ports and IP/Network connections.
Implemented secure JWT-based sessions, background coordinate tracking services, and real-time audio/video streaming modules.

projects.title: Tog POS & ERP System (Tog v-1 / Tog Offline)
projects.overview: A comprehensive Point of Sale (POS) and electronic invoicing app tailored for the Saudi Arabian market, compliant with ZATCA phase 1 & 2. Designed to operate completely offline on Android and Windows Desktop, syncing local data instantly upon connection.
responsibilities: Redesigned the offline core, replacing unstable API-only dependencies with a local relational SQLite database consisting of 27 tables, 14 DAOs, 15+ indexes, 3 triggers, and cascading deletions.
Programmed atomic database transactions for Sales (decreasing stock, registering ledger entries, and saving invoicing details in a single transaction).
Created an RTL rendering and shaping wrapper (using dartarabic and raw bytes layout) to correctly print Arabic invoices on thermal printers.
Integrated window_manager to customize desktop windows and optimized execution performance on low-end Windows POS terminals.

challengesAndSolutions.challenge: Maintaining complex transactions (Sales, Returns, Inventory, Customer balances) in an offline state without synchronization latency or data corruption.
challengesAndSolutions.solution: Implemented the DAO pattern over SQLite with atomic SQL transaction closures, ensuring database constraints and foreign key triggers automatically adjust inventory quantities and customer credits synchronously.

challengesAndSolutions.challenge: Rendering right-to-left (RTL) Arabic texts and dynamic QR codes correctly on diverse non-Unicode thermal printers via ESC/POS.
challengesAndSolutions.solution: Developed a custom text processing middleware that shapes Arabic glyphs and converts them into graphic print buffers (ESC/POS image commands) before dispatching to the hardware.

projects.title: Elbayan Store
projects.overview: A high-performance multi-vendor marketplace app that lets users discover nearby stores, browse nested categories, purchase goods, and trace deliveries on dynamic maps.
responsibilities: Engineered the application utilizing strict Clean Architecture layers (data, domain, presentation).
Integrated the dartz package to enforce functional error-handling patterns, preventing unexpected application runtime crashes.
Built animated dashboard charts with fl_chart and custom skeleton loaders via Skeletonizer to provide an elite, premium UX feel during API loads.

challengesAndSolutions.challenge: Handling multiple map providers (Google Maps vs. Mapbox) for different regions with varying styling and location accuracy constraints.
challengesAndSolutions.solution: Built an abstract map interface layer, allowing the UI to interact with a generic MapController, swap map providers dynamically, and share markers/overlays seamlessly.

projects.title: Gear (ZippyGo - Rider & Captain)
projects.overview: A dual-app ride-hailing solution containing Gear Rider (Passenger client) and Gear Captain (Driver client). Operates real-time tracking, routing, background GPS services, dynamic pricing, and push notification dispatches.
responsibilities: Implemented the background tracking pipeline in Gear Captain using flutter_background_service, ensuring coordinates sync to the server even when the app is suspended.
Established socket.io gateways to dispatch real-time trip alerts to drivers and update passengers' maps with live car coordinates.
Programmed the routing module using flutter_polyline_points to calculate and render the fastest routes between pick-up and destination points.

challengesAndSolutions.challenge: Battery drainage and operating system suspension of background GPS tracking on driver devices.
challengesAndSolutions.solution: Optimized location update rates dynamically depending on device speed, configured persistent notification channels, and requested high-accuracy permission exclusions to bypass OS doze states.

projects.title: Hogga
projects.overview: A peer-to-peer legal services app connecting users with certified attorneys, enabling immediate text discussions, document uploads, and live video/audio consultations.
responsibilities: Integrated the Agora RTC Engine to handle high-fidelity video/audio call streams between clients and attorneys, adjusting bitrates dynamically.
Set up real-time text channels utilizing Laravel Echo and Pusher client to manage message statuses (sent, delivered, read).
Applied flutter_secure_storage to encrypt user authentication tokens and sensitive profile details.

challengesAndSolutions.challenge: Maintaining audio/video call quality and handling unexpected dropouts during consultations in weak network zones.
challengesAndSolutions.solution: Implemented call-state event listeners to automatically fallback to audio-only streaming, trigger auto-reconnection pipelines, and log bandwidth statistics.

projects.title: LearnPress Mobile
projects.overview: A feature-filled learning platform client for LearnPress (WordPress), allowing users to browse courses, test skills with quizzes, stream lectures, and manage certificates.
responsibilities: Integrated the course player supporting audio playback state management with just_audio.
Secured content from piracy by integrating screen_protector to block screenshots and screen recordings in video/text lecture screens.
Implemented Google Play and Apple App Store in-app billing routes for course purchasing using in_app_purchase.

challengesAndSolutions.challenge: Enforcing course licensing rules and securing proprietary video lectures from direct recording.
challengesAndSolutions.solution: Wrote a platform-channel bridge utilizing screen_protector that sets secure layout flags on Android (WindowManager.LayoutParams.FLAG_SECURE) and iOS, blanking screens automatically during recordings.

projects.title: Canary 7
projects.overview: A dual-project comprising a mobile classified ads application (similar to OLX) and a back-office administration dashboard to moderate listings, view analytics, and manage reports.
responsibilities: Created the mobile app and dashboard using Flutter, sharing models and domain rules across both codebases.
Built the admin dashboard analytics using fl_chart to illustrate daily listing trends and top categories.
Developed an image pre-processing engine (via photo_manager and flutter_image_compress) that compresses uploaded images by up to 70% before uploading them to Firebase Storage.

challengesAndSolutions.challenge: Dashboard lagging when loading large lists of ads to moderate from Cloud Firestore.
challengesAndSolutions.solution: Designed a pagination controller in Bloc that retrieves Firestore documents in chunks of 20, caches metadata locally in sqflite, and releases image memories dynamically when items scroll off-screen.

projects.title: Zone
projects.overview: A custom platform to reserve wedding halls, event venues, and beauty center sessions with scheduling calendars, interactive maps, and payment routes.
responsibilities: Developed the core booking grid scheduler with Table Calendar, dynamically locking booked dates from the API.
Implemented area filter queries using Local JSON assets (egypt_locations.json) to let users search venues by governate and city.

challengesAndSolutions.challenge: Handling concurrent booking collisions when two customers choose the same slot simultaneously.
challengesAndSolutions.solution: Created an optimistic reservation state machine that checks slots with a fast lock API request before launching the billing flow.

projects.title: My Feny
projects.overview: An on-demand home maintenance application linking users with licensed technicians. Operates live request status monitoring, chatting, and ratings.
responsibilities: Constructed the request lifecycle tracker illustrating real-time service updates (Pending, Accepted, In-Progress, Completed) with custom stepper widgets.
Configured Firebase Messaging notifications to alert users of technician arrivals and messages.

projects.title: BuB (Book Your Beauty)
projects.overview: A beauty appointment scheduler containing salon profiles, stylist bookings, price menus, and instant notifications.
responsibilities: Built the salon menus listing catalog with smooth filter states in Bloc.
Configured local caches for user settings and favorite stylist profiles using shared_preferences.

projects.title: History Tell (History Quiz)
projects.overview: A levels-based history educational quiz application with progress tracking, scoreboards, and challenges.
responsibilities: Designed the levels progression engine saving scores and unlocking achievements in a local sqflite database.
Wrote the JSON parsing controller loading quiz categories and questions dynamically from assets.

education.institution: Delta University for Science and Technology
education.degree: Bachelor of Science in Computer Science
